Description: Unique identifier of the specific handler configuration used.
The type (alley scraper, manual scraping, flushing, or parlor scraping) of manure handler.
The rate of water use (L per animal per day, total of fresh and/or recycled water) by a specified manure handler.
The fraction (0.XX) of cleaning water used by a specified handler that is from recycled (not fresh) water sources.
True/false indication for if a parlor flush (which may be partially or fully recycled water) is used in addition to routine parlor water cleaning with fresh water.
